test.create_query: CREATE TABLE test_join_used_flags (i64 Int64, i32 Int32) ENGINE = Memory
CREATE TABLE probe_used_flags (key Int64) ENGINE = Memory
CREATE TABLE build_used_flags (key Int64) ENGINE = Memory
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO test_join_used_flags SELECT number AS i64, rand32() AS i32 FROM numbers_mt(1500000)
INSERT INTO probe_used_flags SELECT number % 1111 FROM numbers(250000000)
INSERT INTO build_used_flags SELECT number FROM numbers(1000)
test.query: SELECT l.i64, r.i64, l.i32, r.i32 FROM test_join_used_flags l RIGHT JOIN test_join_used_flags r USING i64 format Null
SELECT l.key, r.key FROM probe_used_flags l RIGHT JOIN build_used_flags r ON l.key = r.key FORMAT Null
